entry.title: IDC HT940214D0002 (P00050) awarded to EXPRESS SCRIPTS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: IGF::OT::IGF THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO DOCUMENT A WAIVER GRANTED BY THE CONTRACTING OFFICER TO RECONCILE THE CONFLICTING REGULATORY GUIDANCE OF TWO MAJOR GOVERNMENT HEALTHCARE PROGRAMS.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: DIRECT HEALTH AND MEDICAL INSURANCE CARRIERS

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: IGF::OT::IGF THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO INCORPORATE INTO THE CONTRACT, CHANGE 136 OF THE TRICARE POLICY MANUAL (TPM136), DATED JUNE 5, 2015 AND TITLED NATIONAL DEFENSE AUTHORIZATION ACT FISCAL YEAR 2015 SECTION 706 BREASTFEEDING SUPPORT.

entry.title: IDC HT940214D0002 (P00053) awarded to EXPRESS SCRIPTS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: IGF::OT::IGF THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO INCORPORATE INTO THE CONTRACT, CHANGE 145 OF THE TRICARE OPERATIONS MANUAL (TOM145), CHANGE 137 OF THE TRICARE POLICY MANUAL (TPM137), AND CHANGE 74 OF THE TRICARE SYSTEMS MANUAL (TSM74); ALL CHANGES ARE DATED JULY 1, 2015, AND TITLED "CONSOLIDATED CHANGE 15-001."

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: DIRECT HEALTH AND MEDICAL INSURANCE CARRIERS

entry.title: IDC HT940214D0002 (P00054) awarded to EXPRESS SCRIPTS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
IGF::OT::IGF
THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TWOFOLD:
1. REVISE URL ADDRESSES AND RELATED LANGUAGE IN THE CONTACT WHICH ARE NO LONGER ACCURATE DUE TO THE DEACTIVATION OF THE PEC WEBPAGE AS OF JUNE 26, 2015.
2. CHANGE KEY PERSONNEL IN SECTION G PER "NOTIFICATION OF CHANGE IN KEY PERSONNEL" PROVIDED BY EXPRESS SCRIPTS' LETTER (LJB-CM-03206) DATED JULY 14, 2015.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: DIRECT HEALTH AND MEDICAL INSURANCE CARRIERS

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC HT940214D0002 (P00057) awarded to EXPRESS SCRIPTS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
IGF::OT::IGF
THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO CORRECT A MISTAKE OF THE PARTIES REGARDING THE INVOICING INSTRUCTIONS AT PARAGRAPH G.5.4; AS WELL AS CORRECTING TYPOGRAPHICAL ERRORS TO PARAGRAPHS G.1.5, G.5.7 AND G.7.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: DIRECT HEALTH AND MEDICAL INSURANCE CARRIERS

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC HT940214D0002 (P00058) awarded to EXPRESS SCRIPTS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
IGF::OT::IGF
THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO INCORPORATE TRICARE POLICY MANAUAL CHANGE 141 (TPM 141) AND TRICARE OPERATIONS MANUAL CHANGE 149 (TOM 149) INTO THE CONTRACT. THE TPM141 / TOM149 CHANGE TERMINATES THE TFL MANDATORY MAIL PILOT AND APPLIES THE REQUIREMENTS OF THAT DEMONSTRATION TO ALL TRICARE BENEFICIARIES. ACTIVE DUTY SERVICE MEMBERS (ADSMS) ARE EXEMPT.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: DIRECT HEALTH AND MEDICAL INSURANCE CARRIERS

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC HT940214D0002 (P00059) awarded to EXPRESS SCRIPTS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
IGF::OT::IGF
THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO INCORPORATE INTO THE CONTRACT: CHANGE 146 OF THE TRICARE OPERATIONS MANUAL (TOM146) AND CHANGE 75 OF THE TRICARE SYSTEMS MANUAL (TSM75) ENTITLED, NATIONAL INSTITUTE OF STANDARDS AND TECHNOLOGY (NIST). ADD DFARS CLAUSE 252.204-7012 (NOV 2013), REPLACE CONTRACT DATA REQUIREMENTS LISTS (CDRLS) REPORTS, AND REMOVE NIST REDUNDANCIES.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: DIRECT HEALTH AND MEDICAL INSURANCE CARRIERS

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
